title: conyza schlechtendalii
intro: Conyza schlechtendalii, also known as Fleabane, is a flowering plant in the daisy family native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Conyza schlechtendalii include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and soothing digestive problems. Conyza schlechtendalii can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to address these health concerns.
